{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Karoshan cruiser
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|A [[Karoshan cruiser]] is overhead.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
